g.text: Prompt: user query + schema context + instructions
SELECT p.name, SUM(o.revenue) AS total FROM products p
JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id GROUP BY p.name LIMIT 10
Runs generated SQL against target database
Format: table / chart / CSV / JSON / markdown
Validates row count and schema match
LLM generates human-readable insight from results
"Top product is Widget A with $2.4M revenue in Q4"
